originalTitle: Far-right Israeli minister condemned for taunting handcuffed Gaza flotilla activists
summary: France and Italy are among the countries that have criticised a video showing Itamar Ben-Gvir taunting dozens of activists detained at an Israeli port.
content: France and Italy are among the countries that have criticised a video showing Itamar Ben-Gvir taunting dozens of activists detained at an Israeli port.
chineseTitle: 以色列极右翼部长因嘲笑戴手铐的加沙船队活动人士而受到谴责
chineseSummary: 法国和意大利等国批评了一段视频，该视频显示伊塔马尔·本格维尔嘲讽了被拘留在以色列港口的数十名活动人士。
chineseContent: 法国和意大利等国批评了一段视频，该视频显示伊塔马尔·本格维尔嘲讽了被拘留在以色列港口的数十名活动人士。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
